title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: February 6, 2025
summary: February 6, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has had another surprising decrease this week at a rate of 0.45% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 0.28%), from the level on 01/30/2025 of 13.454 M km 2 to 13.393 M km 2 for this week. title: Go Digital for SNC Annual Meeting Materials
summary: SNC is proud to continue our efforts toward a more environmentally friendly and cost-effective method of distributing Annual Meeting materials. In previous years, we’ve mailed out extensive packets containing essential documents, including the annual report, meeting notice, proxy statement, agenda,...
